title: Anjisan
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Anjisan''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that tried to disrupt a cargo exchange between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Habassa]] above [[Retep III]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
If the player destroys the Container XI during the mission, a pair of Transports, X-Wings and B-Wings will arrive to destroy the frigate.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
